symbols: golden radiant halo — the saint's sanctity and heavenly glory
youthful features — Florian's depiction as a young Roman soldier-saint
description: A close-up detail of a Renaissance painting showing the head and upper shoulders of a young man with dark, wavy chin-length hair parted in the center. He has a smooth, youthful face with a slight downward gaze and a faint, gentle expression. He wears a dark garment with a white or light collar beneath a red outer garment. Behind his head, a large golden halo with radiating lines emanates outward against a gold background. The painting technique is precise and detailed, with careful rendering of the hair and facial features in the Northern Italian Renaissance manner.
